title: Cadbury Caramilk
content:
Cadbury Caramilk Twirl is in store and online now. Swirls and Curls of Caramilk covered in Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate.

Product Features

  • Twirl Caramilk Cadbury 39g
  • Twirl Cadbury Caramilk

About Cadbury Caramilk Twirl

The Cadbury Caramilk Twirl is a delicious addition to the Cadbury chocolate family, combining the signature swirled texture of a Twirl bar with the unique caramel-forward flavour that Caramilk is known for. This 39g bar features swirls and curls of Caramilk covered in Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate, giving you the best of both worlds – creamy caramel and classic milk chocolate in one indulgent treat.

Whether you're looking for a quick snack or want to include it in a Cadbury Favourites collection, the Caramilk Twirl is a standout choice. It's also perfect for party bags, lolly hampers, or as part of a larger candy gift box in Australia.

Where to Buy

Cadbury Caramilk Twirl is available for purchase both in-store and online through Sweet's World. You can also find a range of premium chocolate options and bulk lollies in Australia if you're stocking up for events or gifts. Visit our website or check with local retailers that stock our products for availability in your area.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Caramilk and how is it different from regular Cadbury chocolate?

Caramilk is Cadbury's unique caramel-flavoured chocolate that offers a sweet, buttery caramel taste distinct from traditional milk chocolate. It combines rich caramel notes with creamy chocolate, creating a distinctive flavour profile that sets it apart from standard Cadbury varieties.

Is Cadbury Caramilk Twirl available in Australia year-round?

Cadbury Caramilk products, including Twirl, are currently available in store and online at Sweet's World, though availability may vary by season as Caramilk is a specialty line. We recommend checking our website regularly for stock updates and availability.

What size is the Cadbury Caramilk Twirl bar?

The Cadbury Caramilk Twirl comes in a 39g individual bar size, making it perfect for a single-serve treat or snack.

Does Cadbury Caramilk Twirl contain dairy milk chocolate?

Yes, the Cadbury Caramilk Twirl features swirls and curls of Caramilk covered in Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate, giving you the combination of both caramel and classic milk chocolate flavours in one bar.

Where can I buy Cadbury Caramilk Twirl in Australia?

Cadbury Caramilk Twirl is available for purchase both in-store and online through Sweet's World. Visit our website or check with local retailers that stock our products for availability in your area.
